zh.Beaumont du Périgord, , Aquitaine, Franc: 法國阿奎泰道多波奧蒙吉度-培利格德
zh.Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Nouvelle: 法國阿奎泰道多波奧蒙吉度-培利格德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand於1300年出生在法國培利格德時，他的父親Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand45歲，母親Brunissende de FOIX30歲。他於1339年與Eleonore De Vendome在法國阿奎泰道多波奧蒙吉度-培利格德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年2月8日在法國享年69歲。

zh-hans.Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Nouvelle: 法国阿奎泰道多波奧蒙吉度-培利格德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand于1300年出生在法国培利格德时，他的父亲Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand45岁，母亲Brunissende de FOIX30岁。他于1339年与Eleonore De Vendome在法国阿奎泰道多波奧蒙吉度-培利格德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年2月8日在法国享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand was born in 1300, in Périgord, France, his father, Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand, was 45 and his mother, Brunissende de FOIX, was 30. He married Eleonore De Vendome in 1339, in Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 February 1369, in France, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand est né en 1300, à Périgord, France, son père, Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Brunissende de FOIX, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Eleonore De Vendome en 1339, à Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1369, à France, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand 1300 in Périgord, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand 45 und seine Mutter Brunissende de FOIX 30. Er hat 1339 in Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich Eleonore De Vendome geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1369 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand è nato il nel 1300 nel Périgord, Francia, il suo padre, Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Brunissende de FOIX, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Eleonore De Vendome nel 1339, nel Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1369, nel Francia, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrandが1300年にフランスプeリゴルドで生まれた時，父Helie De Perigord-Taleyrandは45歳，母Brunissende de FOIXは30歳であった。1339年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンビーウモント-ドウ-プeリゴルドでEleonore De Vendomeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年2月8日にフランスで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand(이)가 1300년 프랑스 pe리고드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Brunissende de FOIX(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1339년 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 보몽-드-pe리고드에서 Eleonore De Vendome(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 2월 8일 프랑스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand nasceu em 1300, em Périgord, França, seu pai, Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Brunissende de FOIX, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleonore De Vendome em 1339, em Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1369, em França, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand родился в 1300 г. в местности пeригорд, Франция, его отцу по имени Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Brunissende de FOIX, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleonore De Vendome в 1339 г. в местности бомонт-ду-пeригорд, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1369 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bernard De Perigord-Taleyrand nació en 1300, en Périgord, Francia, su papá, Helie De Perigord-Taleyrand, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Brunissende de FOIX, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Eleonore De Vendome en 1339, en Beaumont-du-Périgord, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1369, en Francia, a la edad de 69 años.
